zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hadlow於大約1270年出生在英國肯特哈德洛福時，他的父親Richard de Haudlo22歲，母親Mrs. Richard de Haudlo20歲。他於大約1310年與Maud Burnell在英國英格蘭肯特哈德洛福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年8月5日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年77歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hadlow于大约1270年出生在英国肯特哈德洛福时，他的父亲Richard de Haudlo22岁，母亲Mrs. Richard de Haudlo20岁。他于大约1310年与Maud Burnell在英国英格兰肯特哈德洛福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年8月5日在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年77岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hadlow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hadlow in Kent. The placename derives from Old English hāth ‘heath’ or hēafod ‘head’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Adley
meanings: English: probably a variant of Hadlow , with loss of initial H- and modification of the final syllable. Another, less likely, possibility is that it is a variant of Hadley .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hadlow was born about 1270, in Hadlow, Kent, England, his father, Richard de Haudlo, was 22 and his mother, Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, was 20. He married Maud Burnell about 1310, in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 August 1346, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hadlow est né environ 1270, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Haudlo, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maud Burnell environ 1310, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 août 1346, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hadlow um 1270 in Hadlow, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Haudlo 22 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard de Haudlo 20. Er hat um 1310 in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom Maud Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. August 1346 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hadlow è nato il circa 1270 nel Hadlow, Kent, England, il suo padre, Richard de Haudlo, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maud Burnell circa 1310, nel Hadlow, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1346, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hadlowが約1270年にイギリスケントハドロウで生まれた時，父Richard de Haudloは22歳，母Mrs. Richard de Haudloは20歳であった。約1310年にイギリスイギリスケントハドロウでMaud Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年8月5日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで77歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアアクトン ブルネルスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 처르치
ko.St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropsh: 영국 슈럽실르 악턴 버넬 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hadlow(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Haudlo(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard de Haudlo(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로에서 Maud Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 8월 5일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 악턴 버넬 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hadlow nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Haudlo, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Burnell aproximadamente 1310, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1346, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hadlow родился около 1270 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Haudlo было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Burnell около 1310 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 августа 1346 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, актон бурнелл, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hadlow nació aproximadamente 1270, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Haudlo, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard de Haudlo, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maud Burnell aproximadamente 1310, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1346, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
